3489081403.detail_text: Local SG Ready Stock Power Type: USB plug-in type-No Battery Feature: 1. Adjustable Scent Intensity: This car air freshener features five adjustable settings (Fresh/Light/Strong scent) with color-coded indicators for easy selection. Modes range from a subtle fragrance suitable for small spaces like cars (blue, green, and red lights for different frequencies) to more intense settings (yellow and orange-white lights) ideal for larger areas such as offices, bedrooms, and living rooms, ensuring a customisable fragrance experience. 2. Automatic On/Off: Equipped with an intelligent feature, this electric auto air diffuser aroma automatically turns on when the car starts and shuts off as the car stops. This smart functionality saves time and energy by eliminating the need to manually control the device, making every drive effortlessly refreshing. 3. Ultrasonic Nanomist Technology: Utilising advanced ultrasonic nanomist technology, this car fragrance mist evenly disperses scent throughout the vehicle. This technology ensures a rapid release of fragrance in just one second, providing a consistent and lasting scent while quickly neutralising bad odour, enhancing the driving experience with a pleasant atmosphere. 4. Aromatherapy and Air Freshener: Not just an aromatherapy device, this car perfume humidifier also acts as an air freshener. It employs CIO2 purification factors to eliminate odour at their source, ensuring the interior remains fresh and clean. This dual functionality offers both a delightful scent and a purified air environment, making every journey more enjoyable. 5. Alcohol-Free and Additive-Free: Safe for use in vehicles with pregnant women and infants, this air aromatherapy solution is free from alcohol and additives. This commitment to safety ensures that the car remains a healthy and safe environment for everyone, providing peace of mind alongside aromatic bliss. 6.Excellent Gift: The car perfume aroma humidifier is a perfect gift for family, friends, colleagues, neighbours on Christmas, Thanksgiving, Easter, birthdays and other holidays. 7.Unscrew the lid, unplug the perfume sealing cover, insert the diffuser catheter, unscrew the lid back, insert the data cable to open the diffuser 5 Gears Adjustable (fresh/light flavour/strong fragrance): The 1st gear blue light is on, spray once every minute, spray last 1 second The 2nd gear green light is on, spray every 3 minutes, spray last 2 seconds The 3rd gear red light is on, spray every 5 minutes, spray last 2 seconds The 4th gear yellow light is on, spray every 5 minutes, spray lasts for 5 seconds The 5th gear white lights are on, continuous spray mode The first, second, and third gears are suitable for use in small spaces such as the car.

product.desc:
Local SG Ready Stock

Power Type: USB plug-in type-No Battery

Feature:

1. Adjustable Scent Intensity: This car air freshener features five adjustable settings (Fresh/Light/Strong scent) with color-coded indicators for easy selection. Modes range from a subtle fragrance suitable for small spaces like cars (blue, green, and red lights for different frequencies) to more intense settings (yellow and orange-white lights) ideal for larger areas such as offices, bedrooms, and living rooms, ensuring a customisable fragrance experience.

2. Automatic On/Off: Equipped with an intelligent feature, this electric auto air diffuser aroma automatically turns on when the car starts and shuts off as the car stops. This smart functionality saves time and energy by eliminating the need to manually control the device, making every drive effortlessly refreshing.

3. Ultrasonic Nanomist Technology: Utilising advanced ultrasonic nanomist technology, this car fragrance mist evenly disperses scent throughout the vehicle. This technology ensures a rapid release of fragrance in just one second, providing a consistent and lasting scent while quickly neutralising bad odour, enhancing the driving experience with a pleasant atmosphere.

4. Aromatherapy and Air Freshener: Not just an aromatherapy device, this car perfume humidifier also acts as an air freshener. It employs CIO2 purification factors to eliminate odour at their source, ensuring the interior remains fresh and clean. This dual functionality offers both a delightful scent and a purified air environment, making every journey more enjoyable.

5. Alcohol-Free and Additive-Free: Safe for use in vehicles with pregnant women and infants, this air aromatherapy solution is free from alcohol and additives. This commitment to safety ensures that the car remains a healthy and safe environment for everyone, providing peace of mind alongside aromatic bliss.

6.Excellent Gift: The car perfume aroma humidifier is a perfect gift for family, friends, colleagues, neighbours on Christmas, Thanksgiving, Easter, birthdays and other holidays.

7.Unscrew the lid, unplug the perfume sealing cover, insert the diffuser catheter, unscrew the lid back, insert the data cable to open the diffuser

5 Gears Adjustable (fresh/light flavour/strong fragrance):

The 1st gear blue light is on, spray once every minute, spray last 1 second

The 2nd gear green light is on, spray every 3 minutes, spray last 2 seconds

The 3rd gear red light is on, spray every 5 minutes, spray last 2 seconds

The 4th gear yellow light is on, spray every 5 minutes, spray lasts for 5 seconds

The 5th gear white lights are on, continuous spray mode

The first, second, and third gears are suitable for use in small spaces such as the car.

3634841257.detail_text: Enjoy wireless music streaming and convenient charging in your car with the Borofone BC59 Heroic Bluetooth FM Transmitter . Designed for vehicles without built-in Bluetooth, this device allows you to transmit audio directly to your car stereo via FM frequency. Powered by Bluetooth 5.4 with JL chip , it offers a stable, low-latency connection for smooth music playback and clear handsfree calls. The transmitter also supports MP3 playback from USB flash drives up to 32GB , giving you flexible listening options. Equipped with two USB-A ports and one Type-C port , the Borofone BC59 supports fast charging up to 3A , allowing you to charge multiple devices safely while driving. Its compact and lightweight design ensures easy installation without cluttering your car interior. A practical and stylish solution for everyday driving and long journeys.
